description_long: This is a large, wooden half-pipe structure resembling a skateboarding ramp, but annotated as a dam. The main body is constructed from light-colored wood panels, with a smooth, continuous curved surface and vertical side walls. Metal railings run along the top edges for safety, and there is a staircase on one end leading to a raised platform. The structure features a rectangular opening in the center of the ramp, possibly for access or drainage. Black, stylized text is painted on the front and side panels, adding a decorative element. The overall design is robust and industrial, with clear attention to structural integrity and user safety.
description: A large, wooden dam-like structure with curved surfaces, metal railings, a staircase, and decorative text. It features a central opening and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved wooden face, central opening, staircase on the left, and bold black text on the front.
description_view_1: Top-down angle highlights the smooth, continuous ramp surface, central opening, and railings along the edges.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width, central opening, and the staircase structure on the right side.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizes the staircase, platform, and the overall depth of the structure.
